headline: ImpediMed Appoints Erik Anderson as Chief Executive Officer
summary: ImpediMed, a leader in the development and commercialization of medical technologies to clinically monitor and manage fluid and body composition, and its Board of Directors have announced the appointment of Erik Anderson as Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer. Anderson, who joined the company's Board of Directors in February 2026, succeeds Dr. Parmjot Bains. His appointment is effective April 7, 2026.

headline: Casey's General Stores Stock Has Been On a Tear. Now It's Joining The S&P 500
summary: Casey's General Stores is set to join the S&P 500 on Thursday, replacing Hologic after the medtech firm was acquired by Blackstone and TPG.
